rule_description: The target trial requires patients to have a documented gBRCA1 or gBRCA2 mutation and be on a first-line platinum-based regimen for metastatic pancreas cancer, whereas prior trials focus on ovarian cancer and require completion of first-line or multiple lines of platinum-based therapy, indicating a mismatch in cancer type and treatment stage. Severity: 1.0

plan.llm_instruction: Extract the type of cancer and the treatment stage from the trial data. Return the cancer type and treatment stage as a string, separated by a comma. Do not include explanations.
plan.target_parsed_value: metastatic pancreas cancer, first-line platinum-based regimen
